message:
fix: restore fast path for --force-rebuild to skip filesystem rescan

When --force-rebuild is set with existing canonical sessions, skip the
expensive filesystem rescan and go straight to rebuild_tantivy_from_db().
Plain --full continues to rescan as expected (preserving #153 fix).

Closes #171

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
